amendment.description: PRD-081 pivoted to exemplar-first transport proof slice. Scope narrowed to rpc_create_financial_txn (Class A) + rpc_record_grind_observation (Class B) exemplar pair. Deferred to producer expansion slice: rpc_create_financial_adjustment, rpc_request_table_fill, rpc_request_table_credit.
amendment.pipeline_note: No gate reset required. Architecture unchanged (ADR-052–057 frozen). Amendment narrows first implementation slice before EXEC-SPEC generation.

ul_clarification.mandate: All Phase 2–5 artifacts that reference fills, credits, Dependency Events, or authority classification must be consistent with this document. Required reading before Phase 2 (RFC) authoring begins.
key_rules: Dependency Event = domain event consumed as Projection Input with no ledger authority of its own (fills, credits, inventory snapshots)
'estimated' is a provenance label, not an accuracy qualifier — operationally-exact values still carry 'estimated' if non-ledger
Projection Input = Authority Fact | Telemetry Fact | Dependency Event
Conservative authority default: absence of provenance signal must never default to authority — fallback stays 'estimated'
Relay worker must not treat all propagated events as authority-bearing

outbox_knowledge_base.mandate: Primary implementation authority for finance_outbox DDL, trigger classification (D2 vs D6), relay worker design, idempotent consumer, origin_label immutability, and GAP-F1 closure checklist (§12). All Phase 2–5 artifacts must be consistent with it.

overengineering_guardrail.mandate: Active Wave 2 transport-era guardrail. Wave 2 sequencing rule: transport before projection before observability. Core principles: propagate, don't platformize; one internal relay path; replay is not event sourcing; no projection leakage into this slice; event types are cataloged not invented inline; RPC-coupled insertion is frozen for pilot (trigger/CDC/pg_notify must not be reopened). Phase 2–5 work that generalizes the transport layer, bundles projection consumers, adds multi-consumer fan-out, upgrades estimated to actual, or adds UI/dashboard behavior is out of scope. One-line invariant: if this work makes the transport layer responsible for presentation behavior, it is wrong.

fib_pair.status: APPROVED — signed off by Vladimir Ivanov 2026-05-10
fib_pair.mandate: Primary scope authority for this feature. FIB-H is the human scope brief and canonical reference; FIB-S is the machine-legible Zachman-structured companion. All Phase 2–5 artifacts must conform to the FIB containment loop (§E), explicit exclusions (§G), frozen decisions (§I), and scope guardrail blocks (§M / governance section). No downstream artifact may introduce new entities, capabilities, actors, operator-visible outcomes, external contracts, or projection surfaces absent from the FIB without a FIB amendment. Fills/credits routing as Dependency Events is frozen in this FIB and must not be re-opened in Phase 2 RFC.

pipeline_split.feature_pipeline_scope: Phase 4 ADR freezes I1–I4 invariant definitions as consequences; Phase 5 PRD includes 'I1–I4 pass against real implementation' as testable acceptance criterion
pipeline_split.build_pipeline_scope: Harness execution — Jest test files, injection hooks (tests/failure/), npm run test:failure CI step — all EXEC-SPEC scope

invariants.I1_atomicity: PFT/grind INSERT and finance_outbox INSERT are in one pg_current_xact_id(); neither persists without the other
invariants.I2_durability: Committed outbox row survives process crash; relay worker delivers on next poll
invariants.I3_idempotency: Consumer deduplicates via processed_messages; runConsumer() twice produces no duplicate side effects
invariants.I4_replayability: Projections rebuild deterministically from finance_outbox history; truncate + replay = same state

non_goals: No external consumer contract — finance_outbox is internal infrastructure only
No event sourcing — outbox is propagation, not a ledger
No authoritative totals or settlement surfaces
No CDC / WAL replication (Debezium, pg_logical) in Wave 2
No compliance domain scope — mtl_entry / MTLService remains parallel and isolated
No player_id population on Class B rows
No shared-parent table unification of Class A and Class B

stale_flags: SRM footnote ¹ references ADR-016 (payment gateway) for finance_outbox — superseded by ADR-054. SRM update required in Phase 4/5.

resolved_decisions.Q1: Two-store model confirmed. PFT expansion rejected. Class B in separate authoring store (table_buyin_telemetry).
resolved_decisions.Q2: Separate tables confirmed. Shared parent not chosen.
resolved_decisions.Q3: External reconciliation deferred outside pilot scope.
resolved_decisions.Q4: Shared RPC-coupled outbox insertion adopted for both Class A and Class B. Trigger-based insertion rejected.
